title: iberis amara
intro: Iberis amara, also known as Candytuft, is a flowering plant species in the mustard family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Iberis amara can be found in tea, tincture, and salve forms, often used to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, and to promote overall well-being.
